'''ngawovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:llamanaco|llamanaco]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:llamanaco|llamanaco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngawovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæweveth|ngæweveth]] || [[word:ngæwevej|ngæwevej]] || [[word:ngæwevesh|ngæwevesh]] || [[word:ngæweve|ngæweve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawowovoth|ngawowovoth]] || [[word:ngawowovoj|ngawowovoj]] || [[word:ngawowovosh|ngawowovosh]] || [[word:ngawowovo|ngawowovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawovoth|ngawovoth]] || [[word:ngawovoj|ngawovoj]] || [[word:ngawovosh|ngawovosh]] || [[word:ngawovo|ngawovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawofvoth|ngawofvoth]] || [[word:ngawofvoj|ngawofvoj]] || [[word:ngawofvosh|ngawofvosh]] || [[word:ngawofvof|ngawofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawovotho|ngawovotho]] || [[word:ngawovojo|ngawovojo]] || [[word:ngawovosho|ngawovosho]] || [[word:ngawovoko|ngawovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawovoth|ngawovoth]] || [[word:ngawovoj|ngawovoj]] || [[word:ngawovosh|ngawovosh]] || [[word:ngawovo|ngawovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawovothol|ngawovothol]] || [[word:ngawovojol|ngawovojol]] || [[word:ngawovoshol|ngawovoshol]] || [[word:ngawovokol|ngawovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawovothotho|ngawovothotho]] || [[word:ngawovojojo|ngawovojojo]] || [[word:ngawovoshosho|ngawovoshosho]] || [[word:ngawovoko|ngawovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawovothon|ngawovothon]] || [[word:ngawovojon|ngawovojon]] || [[word:ngawovoshon|ngawovoshon]] || [[word:ngawovokon|ngawovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawovothoro|ngawovothoro]] || [[word:ngawovojoro|ngawovojoro]] || [[word:ngawovoshoro|ngawovoshoro]] || [[word:ngawovokoro|ngawovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
